title: Tinkerer's Smithing: KubeJS Compat
description:
A tiny little KubeJS plugin that works around Kube's Recipe Manager shenanigans breaking recipes
from Tinkerer's Smithing.
body:
This is a tiny little KubeJS plugin that works around Kube's Recipe Manager shenanigans breaking recipes from Tinkerer's Smithing. It requires both KubeJS and Tinkerer's Smithing to be installed in order to do anything. And all it does is allow Tinkerer's Smithing to add crafting and repair recipes alongside KubeJS.

There's no configuration.
